containers.turtlebot3_simulator: osrf/ros:jazzy-desktop-full Docker container running the full Gazebo + ROS 2 simulation stack on the host machine
containers.turtlebot3_robot: robotis/turtlebot3 Docker container for Phase 5 hardware deployment on the RPi 4 (arm64), communicates via WiFi DDS

gazebo.gz_server: Gazebo Harmonic physics engine and sensor simulator; publishes /scan, /odom, /imu, /tf via gz-transport
gazebo.gz_gui: Gazebo graphical client (skipped when headless:=true); renders the simulation viewport

bridge_layer.ros_gz_bridge: Bidirectional bridge between Gazebo gz-transport and ROS 2 topics; converts /cmd_vel (Twist, not TwistStamped) and sensor topics
bridge_layer.robot_state_publisher: Reads URDF and publishes static TF frames (/tf_static) for the TurtleBot3 link tree

tb3_bringup.sim_bringup.launch.py: Foundation launch: starts Gazebo server, GUI, ros_gz_bridge, and robot_state_publisher for turtlebot3_world
tb3_bringup.sim_house.launch.py: Same as sim_bringup but loads the turtlebot3_house indoor world
tb3_bringup.gamepad.launch.py: Launches joy_node + teleop_twist_joy + gamepad_manager for F310 gamepad control
tb3_bringup.teleop.launch.py: Launches teleop_twist_keyboard for interactive keyboard driving (requires TTY)
tb3_bringup.wanderer.launch.py: Launches lidar_monitor + wanderer for autonomous reactive obstacle avoidance
tb3_bringup.slam.launch.py: Launches slam_toolbox online_async for SLAM mapping without Nav2
tb3_bringup.nav2.launch.py: Launches the Nav2 navigation stack (requires slam.launch.py for map→odom TF)
tb3_bringup.capability_demo.launch.py: Full M3 stack: SLAM + Nav2 + lidar_monitor + patrol or wanderer selectable via mode:= arg

tb3_monitor.lidar_monitor: Subscribes /scan (LaserScan) and publishes /closest_obstacle (Float32) at 5 Hz; minimum distance extraction
tb3_monitor.health_monitor: Subscribes /battery_state and /imu; logs battery voltage, charge percentage, and IMU orientation
tb3_monitor.mock_battery: Publishes simulated /battery_state at 1 Hz for testing health_monitor without real hardware
tb3_monitor.tf2_verifier: Debug/test utility that verifies the map→base_link TF chain is complete and fresh; not a production node

tb3_controller.joy_node: Reads F310 gamepad from /dev/input via SDL2 and publishes /joy (sensor_msgs/Joy) at 20 Hz
tb3_controller.teleop_twist_joy: Maps F310 joystick axes to /cmd_vel_raw Twist; RB=deadman hold, LB=turbo
tb3_controller.gamepad_manager: E-stop gate: passes /cmd_vel_raw → /cmd_vel; B=stop, A=clear, Y=shutdown; publishes /estop with RELIABLE+TRANSIENT_LOCAL QoS
tb3_controller.wanderer: Reactive obstacle avoidance node; subscribes /scan and /estop, publishes /cmd_vel; forward/turn/stop state machine
tb3_controller.patrol: Nav2 action client that cycles through hardcoded map-frame waypoints; cancels goal on /estop signal
tb3_controller.scan_action_server: Action server providing /tb3_scan_360 (360° rotation) using odometry feedback; available for future use
tb3_controller.teleop_twist_keyboard: Keyboard teleoperation; publishes /cmd_vel directly (requires interactive TTY session)

autonomous_stack.slam_toolbox: online_async SLAM node; subscribes /scan, publishes /map (OccupancyGrid) and the map→odom TF transform
autonomous_stack.nav2_stack: Full Nav2 navigation stack (bt_navigator, DWB local planner, costmap servers); provides /navigate_to_pose action, publishes /cmd_vel

config_files.bridge_params.yaml: Defines 7 ros_gz_bridge topic mappings including /cmd_vel as geometry_msgs/Twist (not TwistStamped)
config_files.teleop_twist_joy.yaml: F310 D-mode axis/button mapping: axis[4]=linear, axis[0]=angular, RB=deadman; velocity scales
config_files.slam_params.yaml: slam_toolbox tuning: 0.05 m/cell resolution, 3.5 m max range, Ceres solver, loop closure enabled
config_files.nav2_params.yaml: Nav2 tuning for TB3 Burger: robot_radius=0.105 m, max_vel_x=0.22 m/s, DWB local planner

key_topics./scan: LiDAR scans from Gazebo (LaserScan); consumed by wanderer, lidar_monitor, slam_toolbox, Nav2 costmap
key_topics./cmd_vel: Drive commands (Twist) sent to ros_gz_bridge; produced by gamepad_manager, wanderer, Nav2, or keyboard
key_topics./cmd_vel_raw: Pre-e-stop gamepad velocity from teleop_twist_joy; gated by gamepad_manager before reaching /cmd_vel
key_topics./joy: Raw gamepad state from joy_node; consumed by teleop_twist_joy and gamepad_manager
key_topics./estop: Boolean e-stop signal (RELIABLE+TRANSIENT_LOCAL); published by gamepad_manager, consumed by wanderer and patrol
key_topics./map: OccupancyGrid from slam_toolbox; consumed by Nav2 global costmap
key_topics./odom: Odometry from Gazebo DiffDrive plugin; consumed by scan_action_server and Nav2
key_topics./battery_state: Battery telemetry; published by mock_battery in sim, consumed by health_monitor
key_topics./closest_obstacle: Minimum LiDAR distance (Float32) published by lidar_monitor at 5 Hz
